news.headline: Integer Holdings Corp (NYSE: ITGR) set Q2 2024 earnings release on July 25, 2024, at 7am CT / 8am ET with a webcast at 8am CT / 9am ET.
news.summary: Integer Holdings Corporation (NYSE:ITGR) from Plano, Texas, is set to unveil its financial and operational performance for the second quarter of 2024 on July 25, 2024. The results will be published at 7 a.m. Central Time (CT) / 8 a.m. Eastern Time (ET), followed by a webcast led by Integer management at 8 a.m. CT / 9 a.m. ET to delve into the details. During the call, alongside the quarterly results, other significant forward-looking and material data could also be addressed.

news.headline: BlackBerry beat Q1 earnings estimate with a loss of 3 cents per share, despite revenues down to $144 million from $373 million YoY.Q2 revenue expected $136-144 million with Cybersecurity business at $82-86 million and IoT business at $50-54 million. Fiscal 2025 revenue projected at $586-616 million, with Cybersecurity business expected at $350-365 million.
news.summary: BlackBerry Limited (NYSE: BB) reported an adjusted loss per share of 3 cents for the first quarter of fiscal 2025 (ended May 31), which was narrower than its expected 4-6 cents loss per share. In the same quarter last year, the company reported earnings of 6 cents per share. Despite a decline in revenue to $144 million from $373 million in the previous year, it exceeded the guidance of $130-$138 million. Software product revenues contributed 85% to total revenues, with professional services adding 15%.For the fiscal second quarter, BlackBerry expects revenues in the range of $136-$144 million, with Cybersecurity revenues estimated at $82-$86 million and IoT business revenues at $50-$54 million. The company anticipates revenues of $586-$616 million for fiscal 2025, with Cybersecurity business revenues projected at $350-$365 million, despite challenges in macroeconomic conditions affecting sales cycles. Licensing & Other revenues are expected to be $4 million. The full story is available on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: MemorialCare Orange Coast Medical Center wins CMQCC awards for birth volume, quality, sustainability & cesarean birth rate.
news.summary: In Fountain Valley, California on June 27, 2024, the California Maternal Quality Care Collaborative (CMQCC) announced that it has granted an award to MemorialCare Orange Coast Medical. The CMQCC, which aims to decrease morbidity, mortality, and racial inequalities in maternal healthcare in California, has recognized the hospital for its contributions.

news.headline: Fed's 2024 stress test shows large banks have strong capital positions in severe recession scenario, facing greater losses. Fed stresses important lessons learned from the 2023 regional bank crisis. Net interest income remains resilient; full story on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: The Federal Reserve Board's stress test revealed that large banks could handle a severe recession, showing they have enough capital to meet minimum requirements. This year’s test is as tough as last year's but resulted in greater losses due to riskier balance sheets and higher expenses. Vice chair Michael S. Barr emphasized the importance of learning from the 2023 regional bank crisis. Despite potential funding shocks, large banks are deemed well-prepared, with resilient net interest income. The test results indicate banks are in a strong position to manage unforeseen challenges in key financial metrics.

news.headline: PENN Entertainment (NASDAQ: PENN) partners with Ticketmaster to offer live event perks to 30M PENN Play members, enhancing user experience.
news.summary: PENN Entertainment, Inc. has enhanced its loyalty program by partnering with Ticketmaster, offering more than 30 million PENN Play members access to live events. Members can now redeem rewards for concert, sporting event, and show tickets through Ticketmaster for immersive experiences. The expansion includes on-site activations at five major amphitheaters in the US. With a surge in global live event demand, fans are keen on loyalty programs that offer event perks. This move by PENN Entertainment should position the company favorably.

news.headline: Money market fund assets increased by $4.97 billion to $6.10 trillion in an 8-day period ending June 26 - ICI.
Presidential candidates' stress levels to be decoded in 1st 2024 debate by FiscalNote's Roll Call and StressLens.
news.summary: In the upcoming 2024 presidential debate, the stress levels of the two candidates will be analyzed by Roll Call and StressLens. By decoding the human element, they aim to determine how stressed Joe Biden and Donald Trump will be during the debate. This analysis will provide valuable insights into the candidates' mental states during this crucial event.

news.headline: Global froth flotation equipment market to grow by USD 82.6 million (4.36% CAGR) from 2024-2028 due to high demand from mineral and ore processing applications.
news.summary: As of June 27, 2024, the worldwide market for froth flotation equipment is projected to increase by approximately USD 82.6 million between 2024 and 2028, as per analysis by Technavio. This market is expected to exhibit a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 4.36% throughout the forecast period. The surge in demand primarily stems from the mineral and ore sectors.

news.headline: NMG held virtual AGM, shared update on business strategy & projects. Agreements with Panasonic.
news.summary: Montreal-based Nouveau Monde Graphite Inc., known as NMG, conducted its virtual Annual General and Special Meeting of Shareholders. The meeting included a corporate presentation where NMG’s management team briefed shareholders on the company's progress on key projects and partnerships. NMG has agreements with Anchor Customers such as Panasonic Energy Co., Ltd., a subsidiary of Panasonic Holdings Corporation. NMG is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol NMG and on the TSX.V as NOU.

news.headline: AI Trust Foundation adds 6 new Board members to enhance safe and beneficial AI use, driving collaborative efforts.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, the AI Trust Foundation revealed the addition of six prominent individuals to its Board of Directors, signaling a strategic push for enhancing the responsible deployment of AI. This move underscores the organization's commitment to fostering secure and advantageous utilization of AI technologies through extensive cooperation with key stakeholders.

news.headline: Significant MOC imbalance reported, with a surplus of $2.5 billion leading to market instability.
Dow Jones down, Nasdaq up; Chipotle, Nvidia stocks sink. Roaring Kitty impacts other stock. DJI down while Nasdaq up.
news.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average saw a decline, contrasting with Nasdaq's slight increase. Chipotle Mexican Grill's stock experienced a significant drop. Additionally, the S&P 500 also displayed a slump as Nasdaq led in gains. Notably, Nvidia and Chipotle saw declines, while a particular stock moved significantly, catching attention.

news.headline: GiantLeap Capital invests in Vantage Data Centers in a capital raise oversubscribed, led by DigitalBridge Group and Silver Lake.
news.summary: A major increase in capital was observed, exceeding the intended amount, and was spearheaded by investment entities overseen by DigitalBridge Group, Inc. (NYSE: DBRG) and Silver Lake. This investment underscores GiantLeap Capital's emphasis on growth equity in both private and public unique circumstances.

news.summary: As of June 27, 2024, the current transformer market size worldwide is projected to increase by approximately USD 457.4 million between 2024 and 2028, as reported by Technavio. Over the forecast period, the market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.09%. This growth is attributed to the improved precision of current transformers, leading to...

news.headline: Bioretec Ltd. announces update on RemeOs™ trauma screw European CE mark application from Notified Body Dekra.
news.summary: In Tampere, Finland on June 27, 2024, Bioretec Ltd., a leading provider of bioresorbable orthopedic implants, revealed that their application for European CE mark market authorization for the RemeOs™ trauma screw has been validated by the Notified Body, Dekra. This development signifies a significant milestone for Bioretec Ltd. as they continue to establish themselves as a key player in the medical device industry. The approval opens up the potential for the company to expand its market reach and cater to a larger customer base. This achievement underscores Bioretec Ltd.'s commitment to innovation and quality in the field of orthopedic implants.

news.headline: Graf Global Corp. closes $230M IPO with 23M units sold at $10 each, including 3M exercised by underwriters.
news.summary: Today in The Woodlands, TX, Graf Global Corp. revealed the completion of its initial public offering of 23,000,000 units. This incorporates 3,000,000 units exercised by underwriters utilizing their over-allotment option. The offering was priced at $10.00 per unit, generating total gross proceeds of $230,000,000.

news.headline: Globant introduces AI Agents after over 10 years of investment in AI technology to enhance software development life cycle.
news.summary: Globant has invested in AI for over a decade, resulting in a new suite of AI Agents and products designed to enhance team performance and drive better outcomes. These AI Agents, backed by human oversight, will revolutionize the entire Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC), covering areas such as backend prototyping, application design, and testing.

news.headline: BGL assists Zidian Group's acquisition by Lassonde Industries Inc., boosting Lassonde's North American market position.
news.summary: Lassonde is set to enhance its presence in the North American specialty food market following an acquisition. The Zidian Group, parent company of Summer Garden Food Manufacturing, has been acquired by Lassonde. The deal, announced on June 27, 2024, signifies a strategic move by Lassonde to solidify its standing in the market. This acquisition marks a significant development in the sector, amplifying Lassonde's capabilities and reach.

news.headline: U.S. Center for SafeSport's 2023 Annual Report details abuse prevention efforts within Olympic Movement.
news.summary: The 2023 Annual Report from the U.S. Center for SafeSport in Denver highlights initiatives aimed at addressing and combating abuse within the Olympic and Paralympic Movement in the United States. This report focuses on various strategies and actions taken to prevent and respond to instances of abuse. The Center's efforts in 2023 are detailed, showcasing their dedication to promoting safety and well-being in sports.

news.headline: Global EDLC market to grow by USD 1.21 billion from 2024-2028, with CAGR of 18.52%; long life cycle of EDLCs to boost growth.
news.summary: As of June 27, 2024, the worldwide market for electric double-layer capacitors (EDLC) is projected to expand by approximately USD 1.21 billion between 2024 and 2028, as reported by Technavio. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 18.52% throughout the forecast period. One of the key advantages driving this growth is the extended lifespan of EDLCs compared to other energy storage solutions.

news.headline: Nashville's ObjectiveHealth and QualDerm Partners partner to enhance patient care options in dermatology services.
news.summary: ObjectiveHealth, a clinical research provider based in Nashville, Tennessee, is expanding its partnership with QualDerm Partners, a dermatology services organization. This collaboration aims to enhance their services in the aesthetics sector.

news.headline: EO introduces season 3 of Start it Up, a six-part docuseries. Premieres on YouTube on June 28.
news.summary: A six-part docuseries titled "Start it Up" will debut on YouTube on June 28, 2024, with one episode airing each day for six days. Produced by the Entrepreneurs' Organization (EO), this marks the premiere of the third season. The series highlights student entrepreneurs and their journeys.

news.headline: Federal RAISE grants highlight high demand for safer walking and biking infrastructure. Majority aid cyclists/pedestrians, bridging gaps in transportation networks. Equitable mobility push; significant funds allocation.
news.summary: A recent analysis conducted by the Rails to Trails Conservancy reveals that the majority of grant awards focus on meeting the needs of cyclists and pedestrians. Many of the grants also aim to bridge gaps in active transportation networks, offering equitable mobility solutions for people in rural, suburban, and urban areas. The analysis, conducted in June 2024, found that a significant number of grants were awarded to fund projects supporting alternative modes of transportation, contributing to improved accessibility.

news.headline: IMF's Georgieva projects 1 Fed rate cut in 2024 and additional cuts in 2025.
Nokia Corp bought its own shares on 27.06.2024 in a repurchase move.
American Cancer Society predicts over 2 million new cancer cases in 2024. Biotech innovations being developed in response.
news.summary: A recent news commentary released by USA News Group on behalf of Oncolytics Biotech Inc. reported that according to the American Cancer Society, in 2024, the United States is projected to surpass 2 million new cancer cases for the first time. This significant increase in new cancer diagnoses underscores the growing prevalence of the disease in the country.

news.headline: Metaverse market to grow by $3.92B (2024-2028), demand for AR/VR tech fuels 63.64% CAGR, per Technavio.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, it was reported that the worldwide Metaverse market is projected to increase by approximately USD 3.92 billion between 2024 and 2028, as stated by Technavio. The market is expected to expand at a compound annual growth rate of 63.64% throughout the forecast period. The surge in demand for augmented reality (AR) and virtual reality (VR) technology is a key factor propelling this growth.

news.headline: Global liposomal products market to grow by $3.99 billion from 2024-2028, with a CAGR of 10.87%, driven by fungal disorders.
news.summary: In New York on June 27, 2024, it was reported that the global market size for liposomal products is projected to increase by approximately USD 3.99 billion between 2024 and 2028, as per Technavio. The market is expected to experience a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 10.87% throughout the forecast period. This growth is attributed to the increasing prevalence of fungal disorders...

news.headline: 2024 presidential debate hosted by CNN will have no live audience. Viewers at home can play bingo and drinking game. Coverage starts 9 p.m. ET Thursday for 90 mins with two commercial breaks. Topics include Weaponization, Fani Willis, Israel, critical race theory, among others. Biden and Trump to share views.
news.summary: The first 2024 presidential debate, hosted by CNN and airing at 9 p.m. ET Thursday, will not have a live audience due to COVID-19 precautions. It will feature Donald Trump and Joe Biden discussing key topics for 90 minutes with two commercial breaks. The New York Post has launched a bingo game with topics like critical race theory and the American dream for viewers to engage with. The debate will cover a range of issues impacting the upcoming election. Topics on the bingo board include voter fraud, Ukraine, and China. Warner Bros. Discovery owns CNN and is hosting the event. The bingo game offers viewers a fun way to engage with the debate and potential sound bites.

news.headline: St. Joseph's Hospital in Tampa uses 'Tampa 2' procedure to treat AFib, aiming to revolutionize treatment.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on June 27, 2024, healthcare professionals at St. Joseph's Hospital, affiliated with BayCare Health System, have devised an innovative treatment for atrial fibrillation (AFib) utilizing state-of-the-art technology and their specialized knowledge.

news.headline: Crypto rebounds, ETFs gain inflows. US transfers 3940 BTC to exchanges. Spot ETH ETFs expected July 4. Coinbase sues SEC, big buying opp. Man guilty of BTC theft. Blast FDV $2.5bn, ADA DDoS issues. Deep fake losses may reach $24bn 2024. Miners see M&A boom. Marathon mines $16M KAS. Vitalik launches ZK voting firm Rarimo. Animoca Brands ponders going public.
news.summary: Cryptocurrency markets have shown a rebound recently, with Exchange-Traded Funds (ETFs) experiencing a small net inflow. The US government has transferred a significant amount of 3940 Bitcoins to exchanges. It is anticipated that Ethereum (ETH) ETFs could be introduced on July 4th. Popular crypto platform Coinbase has taken legal action against the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) regarding Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) requests. Experts believe that the current market presents a prime opportunity for investors. In other news, a US individual has been found guilty of carrying out home invasions to steal Bitcoin. Blast, a company that launched with a $2.5 billion full dilution valuation (FDV), has left many unsatisfied. Cardano (ADA) has been dealing with Distributed Denial of Service (DDoS) attacks resulting in a backlog of 200 transactions. Reports suggest that financial losses due to deep fakes could peak at $24 billion by 2024. The mining industry is witnessing a surge in mergers and acquisitions (M&A) due to the implementation of Artificial Intelligence (AI) technology. Marathon, a mining firm, has successfully mined Kasumi (KAS) valued at $16 million. Ethereum co-founder Vitalik Buterin has introduced Rarimo, a Zero-Knowledge (ZK) voting company. Additionally, Animoca Brands is contemplating going public with a stock listing.

news.headline: This week's FX option expiries total $3.5 billion, with largest at $1 billion for EUR/USD at 1.21. #forex #options

The market is anticipated to expand at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 8.09% throughout the forecast period. This growth is attributed to factors such as...

news.headline: Milan Laser Hair Removal names Tracie Wickenhauser as COO, bringing 25+ years of experience to nation's largest provider.
news.summary: Tracie Wickenhauser has been appointed as the Chief Operating Officer of Milan Laser Hair Removal, the largest laser hair removal provider in the country. With over 25 years of experience, Wickenhauser will be joining the company based in OMAHA, Neb. This announcement was made on June 27, 2024. Milan Laser Hair Removal is known for its nationwide presence and industry-leading services.

news.headline: Laredo Oil starts drilling Reddig 11-21 well in Midfork field in Montana.
news.summary: On June 27, 2024, Laredo Oil, Inc. shared an important update regarding its subsidiary, Hell Creek Crude, LLC, initiating drilling operations for the Reddig 11-21 well within the Midfork field in Valley County, Montana. Laredo Oil, a company listed on the OTC Pink Sheets under the symbol LRDC, revealed this development as part of its ongoing operations in the region. The commencement of drilling in this well signifies a significant milestone for the company as it expands its presence and activities in the energy sector. It showcases Laredo Oil's commitment to advancing its strategic initiatives and furthering its exploration and production efforts.

news.headline: New prediction market for Ethereum launches on PancakeSwap, featuring AI. PolyMarket sees increased activity before U.S. elections.
news.summary: As new platform is introduced, there is a notable increase in engagement on platforms like PolyMarket in anticipation of the upcoming U.S. elections in November.

news.headline: Voters anticipate US debate: Will Trump or Biden discuss crypto? Crypto users urge moderators to include question in the debate.
news.summary: A significant number of individuals engaged in cryptocurrency are urging CNN moderators Jake Tapper and Dana Bash to pose a question regarding digital assets to the two candidates during the upcoming event.

news.headline: Georgieva states IMF's US inflation prediction is slightly higher than Fed's.
IMF's Georgieva says US consumer spending boost from pandemic wealth may be slowing, easing inflation. #economy #IMF
Beyond the Ball and HRP Group host summer youth basketball tournament in Chicago's Little Village. Renovated courts attracted nearly 1,000 attendees.
news.summary: A recent youth tournament in Chicago attracted an impressive turnout of almost 1,000 young participants and their families. The event, organized collaboratively by Beyond the Ball (BTB) and HRP Group (HRP), featured various basketball court enhancements. These improvements comprised the installation of new asphalt pavement, repairs to the fence, upgraded LED lighting, and fresh striping.

news.headline: Explore North Dakota's Native American culture with 30,000 residents and five tribal nations. Multiple events in late summer/fall.
news.summary: In Bismarck, North Dakota, as of June 27, 2024, an estimated 30,000 Native American residents and five tribal nations play vital roles in preserving Indigenous cultures. The state annually hosts various events, particularly in late summer and early fall, to celebrate and honor Indigenous traditions.

news.headline: REMADE Institute receives $380,000 grant to provide workforce training for electronics scrap industry with partners RIT, ReMA and RIC.
news.summary: Rochester, New York - The REMADE Institute has secured $380,000 from the U.S. Department of Energy to provide training for businesses and workers in the flourishing electronics scrap and remanufacturing sectors. This funding aims to support the nation's rapidly expanding industries, fostering growth and innovation in the field.

news.headline: FDA approves first point-of-care Hepatitis C RNA test, allowing single-visit testing. Marketing authorization granted to Cepheid for Xpert HCV test and GeneXpert Xpress System. June 27, 2024.
news.summary: A new test called Xpert HCV, along with the GeneXpert Xpress System, has been approved by the FDA for marketing. This test allows for single-visit testing and treatment for Hepatitis C, reducing the time needed for diagnosis and intervention. The approval was granted on June 27, 2024. This development will streamline the process for diagnosing and treating Hepatitis C in the United States.

news.headline: IMF recommends Fed maintain rates until at least 2024.
US core PCE expected to reach 2.5% in 2025, returning to target by mid-year. IMF forecasts.
Coinbase claims no customer data breach following Au10tix's leaked credential. No evidence of misuse reported.
news.summary: Au10tix, a compliance platform, reported that a credential was leaked, but there is no indication that it was utilized to access customer information. Coinbase stated that they have no knowledge of any security breach occurring.

news.headline: Sirius XM investing in content expansion to boost revenues. 2024 subscriber revenues estimated at $6.96 billion (1.44% growth). New shows like The Andy Richter Call-In Show to engage fans. Other content includes The Optimist Project, Mediaite's Press Club, The Road to Cooperstown, and Off Topic with Yamaneika. Shows cover various topics such as inspiring conversations, sports history, and pop culture.
news.summary: Sirius XM (NASDAQ: SIRI) has been making significant investments in expanding its content offerings, which is expected to positively impact its revenue growth in the future. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for the company's 2024 subscriber revenues stands at $6.96 billion, showing a growth of 1.44% year-over-year. The company recently introduced a new show called The Andy Richter Call-In Show, featuring Andy Richter taking direct calls from fans. Richter, known for his long career in late-night television, will be joined by other comedians and friends like Sona Movsesian, Andy Daly, Nicole Byer, and Laurie Kilmartin to provide an engaging and interactive experience for listeners. Furthermore, other new content includes The Optimist Project with Yara Shahidi, Mediaite's Press Club hosted by Aidan McLaughlin, The Road to Cooperstown showcasing Hall of Fame stories, and Off Topic with Yamaneika hosted by comedian Yamaneika Saunders. These diverse shows offer audiences a wide range of content from inspiring conversations and political insights to sports history and pop culture.

news.headline: 46th National Convention of Jack and Jill of America set for July 23-28, 2024 in Minneapolis, celebrating African American families.
news.summary: The 46th National Convention of Jack and Jill of America, Incorporated, the leading African American family organization, will take place in Minneapolis, Minnesota from July 23 to July 28, 2024. The theme for this convention is "Celebrating A Masterpiece of..."

news.headline: Paradigm urges European regulator to reconsider MEV stance on crypto market abuse, warning of potential industry implications.
news.summary: A venture capitalist firm expressed concern over ESMA's strategy for addressing crypto market abuse, stating it could have devastating effects on the industry. They did not propose any alternative solutions.

news.headline: Softchoice wins 2024 Microsoft Americas Partner of the Year Award.
news.summary: Softchoice from Toronto has been awarded the 2024 Microsoft Scale Solutions United States Americas Partner of the Year Award.
